summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for PetPulse premium pet wellness dropshipping agent. Core authentication and security working correctly, but AI integration budget exhausted and data retrieval endpoints experiencing timeout issues.

critical_bugs.issue: EMERGENT LLM budget exhausted - 'Current cost: 6.0721117000000016, Max budget: 6.0'
critical_bugs.impact: AI chat functionality completely broken - returns 500 Internal Server Error
Users cannot view their search history

performance_issues.issue: Consistent 30+ second timeouts despite working database connection
performance_issues.impact: Poor user experience - app appears broken

working_endpoints.status: Working correctly - login successful with token (0.4s response)
Protected route working - returns user data when authenticated (0.1s response)
Database connection working - 6 users, 2 search history records found

working_features: JWT token generation and validation working
User registration creates accounts with discount codes

passed_tests: API health checks (200 OK, fast response)

success_percentage.backend: 40% (4/10 major tests passing, core auth working but data/AI broken)

critical_fixes: URGENT: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exhausted - need new API key or budget increase
URGENT: AI chat completely broken due to budget limits - core app feature unusable
Fix data retrieval endpoint timeouts (history, stats, chat sessions)
Investigate database query performance or add timeout handling
medium_priority: Add database indexes for better query performance
Add retry logic and loading states for slow endpoints
Consider Redis caching for frequently accessed data
investigation_needed: Root cause of 30s timeouts on data endpoints despite working DB connection
Network/Kubernetes routing issues for internal API calls
MongoDB query optimization and indexing strategy
